rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §13.004 governs voter registrar recording and disclosure of applicant information. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 13.004. RECORDING AND DISCLOSURE OF CERTAIN INFORMATION BY REGISTRAR.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to voter registration confidentiality, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption.
